title: What Da Hell Craft
description: A highly chaotic and challenging combination of mods...
body:
What da hell craft is a cursed and chaotic modpack featuring near-constant destructive weather, cryptids, aliens, infected/zombified versions of vanilla mobs, more structures, amplified overworld/nether world generation, and more - all paired with a more challenging approach to end progression, requring you to visit structures around the world/nether to find special eyes of ender which unlock the end portal. You keep some of your inventory upon death to make it slightly easier.

Tag me on YT if you play and post a video (@bigdylyt)
